'''Talofan''' was the capital [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]]. It was the headquarters of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Kintaro]].

{{Planet-stub}}
